quotes.quote: The business that has the best offer wins. Not the best product. Not the best team. An offer is not your product — it is everything you give someone in exchange for their money.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Most businesses compete on product when they should compete on offer design.

quotes.quote: Show me your CAC and your LTV and I will tell you whether your business can scale. Everything else is noise.
quotes.why_they_said_it: He redirects vanity metrics to the only two that matter.

quotes.quote: Raise your prices. Most people underprice because they project their own financial constraints onto their customers. Your customer is not you.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Underpricing is endemic in small business.
